parameters.content:
## USUARIO AD GRUPOS OU
CRIA , ADICIONA GRUPOS E MOVE PARA OU

## CRIA USUARIO AD 
**CRIA USUARIO 
**CRIA PASTA PESSOAL
**ATUALIZA USUARIO

parameters.command:
=Import-Module ActiveDirectory

$usuario   = "{{ $json.USUARIO }}"
$senha     = "{{ $json.senhaPadrao }}"
$nome      = "{{ $json.NOME }}"
$firstName = "{{ $json['First Name'] }}"
$lastName  = "{{ $json['Last Name'] }}"
$email     = "{{ $json.Email }}"
$telefone  = "{{ $json.TELEFONE }}"
$empresa   = "{{ $json.EMPRESA }}"
$cargo     = "{{ $json.CARGO }}"
$cpf       = "{{ $json.CPF }}"
$ou        = "CN=Users,DC=colaborador,DC=local"

$upn       = "$usuario@colaborador.local"
$homePath  = "\\srv01\users$\$usuario"
$homeDrive = "U:"
$basePath  = "F:\Users$"
$userPath  = Join-Path $basePath $usuario

$user = Get-ADUser -Filter "SamAccountName -eq '$usuario'" -Properties Enabled -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

if ($user) {

    Set-ADUser `
        -Identity $user.DistinguishedName `
        -UserPrincipalName $upn `
        -GivenName $firstName `
        -Surname $lastName `
        -DisplayName $nome `
        -EmailAddress $email `
        -OfficePhone $telefone `
        -Company $empresa `
        -Title $cargo `
        -Description $cpf `
        -HomeDirectory $homePath `
        -HomeDrive $homeDrive

    if (-not $user.Enabled) {
        Enable-ADAccount -Identity $user
    }

    Set-ADAccountPassword `
        -Identity $user `
        -Reset `
        -NewPassword (ConvertTo-SecureString $senha -AsPlainText -Force)

    Set-ADUser -Identity $user -ChangePasswordAtLogon $true
}
else {

    New-ADUser `
        -SamAccountName $usuario `
        -UserPrincipalName $upn `
        -Name $nome `
        -DisplayName $nome `
        -GivenName $firstName `
        -Surname $lastName `
        -EmailAddress $email `
        -OfficePhone $telefone `
        -Company $empresa `
        -Title $cargo `
        -Description $cpf `
        -Path $ou `
        -HomeDirectory $homePath `
        -HomeDrive $homeDrive `
        -AccountPassword (ConvertTo-SecureString $senha -AsPlainText -Force) `
        -Enabled $true `
        -ChangePasswordAtLogon $true
}

# === CRIA PASTA HOME COM HERANÇA ===
if (-not (Test-Path $userPath)) {

    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $userPath | Out-Null

    $acl = Get-Acl $userPath

    $ruleUser = New-Object System.Security.AccessControl.FileSystemAccessRule(
        "$($env:USERDOMAIN)\$usuario",
        "Modify",
        "ContainerInherit,ObjectInherit",
        "None",
        "Allow"
    )

    $acl.AddAccessRule($ruleUser)
    Set-Acl -Path $userPath -AclObject $acl
}

Write-Output "USUARIO_PROCESSADO_COM_PASTA_OK"
